rulings.Case Title: FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION VS. GABRIEL MUNOZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 7, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT JOSE MARTINEZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, five days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges cause of action per CCP 1161a. San Francisco Rent Ordinance compliance not an element of this cause of action. = (501/REQ)
